name: EZ Pawn Corp
description_short: EZ Pawn Corp Sunnyside, New York — Family-owned pawnbroker with 16 NYC locations offering collateral-based loans, jewelry appraisals, and retail sales s...
description_long:
EZ Pawn Corp is a three-generation family business founded in 1996 by David Kaminsky, whose father Martin established the original Gem Pawnbrokers in Brooklyn in 1947. The company operates 16 conveniently located stores throughout New York City and positions itself as a quick source of immediate cash for customers needing short-term bridge loans. The business model centers on pawning personal items of value—jewelry, watches, electronics, and other goods—in exchange for same-day cash disbursement.

EZ Pawn Corp's core service is the traditional pawning process: customers bring items of value to any location, trained loan officers appraise the collateral, and customers receive a loan agreement and cash immediately. The company charges a 4% monthly loan rate (48% APR) on standard loans, though they offer 36% APR to active-duty military personnel and dependents under the Military Lending Act. Beyond loans, they operate a retail component where customers can buy and sell items directly. The website includes a loan calculator estimating fees and interest, though it notes that actual charges may include storage, handling fees, and late fees.

The company distinguishes itself through its family heritage and stated commitment to customer service quality. Marketing materials emphasize professional store operations, friendly staff, and honest transactions. They feature customer testimonials praising service speed and fair pricing. EZ Pawn Corp also engages in community giving, partnering with organizations like the Kiss Cares Coat Drive and NYC AIDS Walk. Press coverage from CBS 2 New York and The New York Times highlights their retail shopping experience positioning.

However, prospective customers should understand the financial mechanics: a 4% monthly rate equals 48% annually—substantially higher than credit cards or personal loans, though typical for pawn operations. The loan is secured by collateral, meaning non-payment results in loss of the item. As a collateral-based lender rather than credit-based, EZ Pawn does not report to credit bureaus, so loans do not build credit history. The business operates in a heavily regulated industry with specific licensing and compliance requirements.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement with no credit check or income verification required
16 conveniently located NYC stores for accessibility
Three-generation family business established 1996 with stated focus on integrity and credibility
36% APR option for active-duty military and dependents (compliant with Military Lending Act)
Online loan calculator for transparency on estimated costs before visiting
Dual service model: pawn loans AND retail buying/selling of used items
Positive customer testimonials citing professional staff and fair item valuations
cons: 4% monthly interest rate (48% APR) is significantly higher than personal loans, credit cards, or credit union options
Loss of collateral if loan cannot be repaid; no redemption grace period mentioned
Loans do not report to credit bureaus and cannot build credit history
Website notes additional fees beyond advertised rate: storage, handling fees, and late fees apply
Limited to NYC geography; 16 stores only across New York City
best_for: Customers needing immediate emergency cash ($100-$10K range) with no credit check
Individuals with poor/no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
People seeking to sell used electronics, jewelry, or valuables quickly for cash
Active-duty military personnel eligible for 36% APR (lower than standard 48% APR rate)
diagnosis: EZ Pawn Corp is best for NYC residents needing immediate cash ($100-$5K) against personal collateral who lack access to traditional credit, especially active-duty military. The primary caveat is the 48% APR rate (4% monthly) combined with collateral loss risk if unable to repay within the loan term—suitable only for true short-term bridge loans, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans with immediate cash disbursement
Item appraisal by trained loan officers for loan value determination
Buy/sell retail transactions for used items (jewelry, electronics, watches, etc.)
Online loan calculator for estimating loan costs
Military Lending Act compliant 36% APR loans for active-duty and dependents
Watch repair consultation (heritage service from founder's background)
